name: Blake || Couples Eat Free
description:
“Come on man just hear me out! We’re both broke AND hungry, it’s perfect!”

Usually whenever Blake was being ‘Fake Gay’ with you, it never ended up anywhere. After all, dude swore on everything he stood for, he was straight.

But come a shopping trip to the mall with him, you two were HUNGRY. And with no other options? He spots a particular restaurant..

And now the man’s suggesting you act as a couple for a free meal. While you aren’t entirely opposed to the idea, Blake can get.. a bit too extreme sometimes.

First! (And probably last..) MLM/MalePov bot! This dudes definitely 1000% homosexual, so I figured this stick with that for this one.

ƪ(˘⌣˘)ʃ

I had a friend who acted like this once a while back ago. I fucking hated him honestly.

This guy is apart of another bunch of bots that I made for myself during the same week I released Ryan so I don’t end up having a huge ass hiatus like last time.

I had a lot of fun making this guy, and so I hope you all have fun chatting with him! Love you all xoxo and stay hydrated!

＼＼\\٩( 'ω' )و //／／
